name: kwasa-kwasa-vscode-extensions
description: Complete VSCode extension suite for the Kwasa-Kwasa semantic framework

scripts.install:all: npm run install:turbulance && npm run install:knowledge && npm run install:pattern && npm run install:orchestration && npm run install:boundary
scripts.compile:all: npm run compile:turbulance && npm run compile:knowledge && npm run compile:pattern && npm run compile:orchestration && npm run compile:boundary
scripts.watch:all: concurrently "npm run watch:turbulance" "npm run watch:knowledge" "npm run watch:pattern" "npm run watch:orchestration" "npm run watch:boundary"
scripts.package:all: npm run package:turbulance && npm run package:knowledge && npm run package:pattern && npm run package:orchestration && npm run package:boundary
scripts.install-extensions:all: npm run install-extensions:turbulance && npm run install-extensions:knowledge && npm run install-extensions:pattern && npm run install-extensions:orchestration && npm run install-extensions:boundary
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run compile:all && npm run package:all
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run install-extensions:all
scripts.test: echo "Use the TESTING_CHECKLIST.md to test all extensions"
scripts.clean: rm -f *.vsix && find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find . -name 'out' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.clean:win: del /Q *.vsix 2>nul & for /d /r . %%d in (node_modules) do @if exist "%%d" rd /s /q "%%d" & for /d /r . %%d in (out) do @if exist "%%d" rd /s /q "%%d"

author: Kwasa-Kwasa Project
